PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach\($n in "abomination001","bird","dinosaur","urchin"\){ $p=Resolve-Path "ImageAssets/Creatures/$n.png" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($p\){ try{ $img=[System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($p\); Write-Output "$n : $\($img.Width\)x$\($img.Height\)"; $img.Dispose\(\) }catch{ Write-Output "$n : ERR $_" } } else { Write-Output "$n : missing" } })
